pages.text: Be exposed to krytonite while not being directly under the sun for long enough and become a kryptonian.

Solar stockpile:$(br)You are now able to store energy from the sun in your body.$(br)Your strength and defence is increased based on the amount of energy you have stored.$(br)When you have none/low energy your strength and defence is decreased in the same way.$(br2)Flight:$(br)When the amount of energy has surpassed 5% you are able to fly.

laser eyes:$(br)From 10% of energy you are able to damage any mob in your line of sight with a max range of 32 blocks.$(br2)Frost breath:$(br)You can freeze enemies, slowing and weakening them while also applying a bit of the freezing effect from being in powdered snow. You can also cover the ground with snow and freeze water.
